_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: Flag-HA-DCAF1 associates efficiently with endogenous Lats1 and 2 but not with MST1 or 2 in HEK 293T cells
details: Flag-HA-DCAF1 associates efficiently with endogenous Lats1 and 2 but not with MST1 or 2
